title: ctenopteris alata
intro: Ctenopteris alata, also known as the Ctenopteris fern, is a species of fern native to the tropical regions of the Pacific Islands. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Ctenopteris alata include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce swelling, and even aid in the treatment of fever. Herbal preparations of Ctenopteris alata include teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or ingested to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
